en: Also, you can talk to people about your problems — talk to a friend, a teacher or someone in your family.

zh: 如果你压力大到无法正常运作，你应该寻求专业帮助。
en: If you become so stressed that you can’t function properly, you should seek professional help.

zh: 我发现有压力的事情……嗯，我真的很讨厌……嗯……考试。
en: Things I find stressful ... Well, I really hate ... mm ... doing exams.

zh: 嗯……你知道，前一天晚上我会非常紧张。
en: Mm... I get very nervous the night before, you know.

zh: 而且我睡不着，你明白我的意思吗？
en: And I can't sleep, you know what I mean?

zh: 我也很害羞，不太喜欢去参加聚会。
en: I'm also shy and I don't like going to parties very much.

zh: 你知道，我不介意在小团体里见人。
en: I don't mind meeting people in small groups, you know.

zh: 啊……还有一件事——在法语课上，我受不了在全班面前讲话……呃……我会紧张……嗯……犯很多错误。
en: Ah ... there's another thing — in French lessons I can't stand talking in front of the class ... er... I get nervous and ... mm ... make lots of mistakes.

zh: 嗯……嗯……我喜欢很多事情。
en: Well ... mm... I like a lot of things.

zh: 我喜欢和我的朋友聊天。
en: I love talking to my friends.

zh: 当我累了想放松的时候，我喜欢听音乐，也喜欢阅读。
en: And when I'm tired and want to relax, I enjoy listening to music and I like reading.

zh: 啊……实际上，我挺喜欢闲坐着，什么都不做！
en: Ah ... actually, I quite like sitting around and doing nothing at all!

zh: 你看起来总是那么健康。
en: You always look so healthy.

zh: 我有时放学后和朋友们踢足球。
en: I sometimes play football after school with my friends.

zh: 这很有趣！
en: It's a lot of fun!

zh: 我更喜欢和朋友一起运动，而不是自己一个人锻炼，所以足球对我来说是完美的！
en: I prefer to play sports with friends rather than exercise by myself, so football is perfect for me!

zh: 嗯，看起来它让你保持健康。
en: Well, it looks like it keeps you fit.

zh: 谢谢。我觉得我身材相当好。
en: Thanks. I think I am in pretty good shape.

zh: 这都是因为我锻炼得相当规律。
en: This is all because I exercise quite regularly.

zh: 我每周踢三次足球。
en: I play football three times a week.

zh: 我应该像你一样，尝试定期锻炼。
en: I should try to exercise regularly, just like you.

zh: 但我应该更经常地吃水果和蔬菜。
en: But I should eat fruit and vegetables more often.

zh: 我有两张今晚排球赛的票。
en: I have two tickets for tonight's volleyball game.

zh: 你愿意和我一起去吗？
en: Would you like to go with me?

zh: 但我不太了解排球。
en: But I don’t know much about volleyball.

zh: 每队有六名球员。
en: There are six players on each team.

zh: 一队的球员通过将球发过网到对方场地来开始比赛。
en: A player from one team begins the game by serving the ball over the net into the other court.

zh: 接发球队不能让球落在他们的场地内。
en: The receiving team must not let the ball fall within their court.

zh: 嗯，球队在必须将球送到对方场地之前，最多可以触球三次。
en: Well, the team can touch the ball up to three times before they have to send it over into the other court.

zh: 哇，那一定很难！
en: Wow, it must be very hard!

zh: 这是一则公共服务公告。
en: This is a public service announcement.

zh: 提醒观众关闭手机或将其调至静音。
en: Audiences are reminded to turn off the phones or put them on silence.

zh: 当球在进行中或球员正在发球时，请不要欢呼或大声说话。
en: When the ball is in play or if a player is serving, please do not cheer or talk loudly.

zh: 请等到一分或一局比赛结束后再站起来或离开座位。
en: Wait for the point or game to end before standing up or leaving your seat.

zh: 在比赛期间拍照时，请关闭闪光灯。
en: When taking photos during the match, please turn off your flash.

zh: 请不要向场内投掷任何物品。
en: Please do not throw anything onto the court.

zh: 嗯……我不太了解这里的规则。
en: Mm... I don't know much about the rules here.

zh: 嗯，你不能击打腰带以下的任何部位。
en: Well, you can't hit anywhere below the belt.

zh: 你也不能踢、咬或推对方。
en: And you can't kick, bite or push the other person, either.

zh: 还有哪些其他规则？
en: What other rules are there?

zh: 禁止你用头、肩或手臂击打对方。
en: You're prohibited from hitting the other person with your head, shoulder or arm.

zh: 我猜这些规则使这项运动更安全。
en: I guess these rules make the sport safer.

zh: 手套和护齿套也有帮助，以防发生任何意外。
en: The gloves and mouth guards also help, in case anything happens.

zh: 我是在这里报名参加年度趣味跑吗？
en: Is this where I sign up for the Annual Fun Run?

zh: 这是你的申请表……
en: Here's your application form ...

zh: 这是你第一次参加吗？
en: Is this your first time?

zh: 啊，是的，我感觉有点紧张。
en: Ah, yes, I'm feeling a bit nervous.

zh: 我已经训练了一段时间，但这是我第一次参加跑步比赛。
en: I've been training for a while, but it's my first time running in a race.

zh: 别担心，你会没事的——只要记得在跑步前做热身运动。
en: No worries, you'll be OK — just remember to do a warm-up before you run.

zh: 我对我的第一次跑步毫无准备，结果伤到了自己，不得不中途退出比赛。
en: so unprepared for my first run that I hurt myself and had to quit the race halfway.

zh: 嗯，你要跑很长时间，所以第一个小时不要跑得太快，否则剩下的比赛你就没有足够的精力了。
en: Well, you're going to be running for a long time, so don't run too fast for the first hour or you won't have enough energy left for the rest of the race.

zh: 对。我想我应该之前吃一顿丰盛的早餐，对吧？
en: Right. And I suppose I ought to get a big breakfast before, right?

zh: 当然，但你最后一餐至少应该在跑步前一小时吃完。
en: Sure, but your last meal should be at least one hour before your run.

zh: 而且跑步时不要喝太多水，否则会让你感到恶心。
en: And don't drink too much while running, or it'll make you feel sick.

zh: 一小时前……好的。这真的很有帮助。非常感谢。比赛日见！
en: One hour before ... OK. That's really helpful. Thanks so much. See you on race day!

zh: 你好，是约翰吗？我是威尔。
en: Hello, is that John? It's Will.

zh: 我知道你有很多事要忙，所以你大概没时间看今晚曼联和利物浦的足球比赛。
en: I know you've had lots to occupy your time, so you probably didn't have time to watch the football match between Manchester United and Liverpool tonight.

zh: 啊！那场比赛！我真不敢相信我错过了。谁赢了？
en: Ah! The match! I can't believe I missed it. Who won?

zh: 利物浦！我们三比二赢了。我们的防守非常出色！
en: Liverpool! We won three-two. Our defence was excellent!

zh: 利物浦！三比二？真的吗？这消息太棒了！我们上次踢得太差了！真让人失望。
en: Liverpool! Three-two? Really? That's great news! We played so poorly last time! It was such a disappointment.

zh: 是啊，我知道，但这是真的！球队今晚真的团结一致，打得非常出色。
en: Yeah, I know, but it's true! The team really came together tonight and played amazingly.

zh: 我为自己是粉丝感到非常自豪。
en: I'm so proud to be a fan.

zh: 我喜欢庆祝中秋节。你对它了解多吗？
en: I love celebrating Mid-Autumn Festival. Do you know much about it?

zh: 不，不太了解。它是什么时候？
en: No, not really. When is it?

zh: 它在农历八月十五庆祝。我们通常通过家庭聚餐和吃月饼来庆祝。
en: It's celebrated on the 15th day of the eighth lunar month. We usually celebrate it by having a family dinner and eating moon cakes.

zh: 啊，是的，我去年这个时候去过中国。很多地方都用灯笼装饰着。
en: Ah yes, I visited China last year during this time. A lot of places were decorated with lanterns.

zh: 是的。它们是我们传统的一部分。通常孩子们玩灯笼，而大人们坐在一起，聊天赏月。
en: Yes. They're part of our tradition. Usually children play with lanterns while adults sit together, chatting and enjoying the moon.

zh: 珍妮的生日快到了。为她举办一个惊喜派对怎么样？
en: Jenny's birthday is coming. How about holding a surprise party for her?

zh: 太好了！一定会很有趣！我们会邀请我们所有的朋友。我们会在派对上聊天跳舞。
en: Great! It's going to be fun! We'll invite all our friends. We'll chat and dance at the party.

zh: 是的，我们会有一顿丰盛的晚餐和音乐。做一个大怪物蛋糕怎么样？
en: Yes, we'll have a big dinner and music. How about making a big monster cake?

zh: 一个怪物蛋糕？太棒了！珍妮会大吃一惊的。我们会做一些怪物生日卡片，并送她一些怪物礼物。
en: A monster cake? Wonderful! Jenny will be surprised. We will make some monster birthday cards and give her some monster presents.

zh: 好！她会吹灭蜡烛并许愿。我相信她会非常开心，每个人都会玩得很愉快。
en: Good! She will blow out the candles and make a wish. I'm sure she will be very happy and everyone will have a great time.

zh: 本周我们的文化角是关于派对的，我们邀请了两位来自英国的年轻人来到演播室。
en: Our Culture Corner this week is on parties, and we have two young people from the UK in the studio.

zh: Jenny和Carl，谢谢你们的到来。
en: Jenny and Carl, thank you for coming.

zh: 据我所知，英国的年轻人喜欢参加派对。
en: As far as I know, young people in the UK like to go to parties.

zh: 那么你们喜欢什么样的派对呢？
en: So what kind of parties do you like?

zh: 那意味着你被邀请到某人家中共进晚餐。
en: That means you're invited to someone's house for dinner.

zh: 通常只是一群亲密的朋友聊天，一起度过美好时光。
en: It's usually just a group of close friends chatting and having a good time together.

zh: 嗯，我喜欢大型派对，在那里你可以跳舞、玩乐并结识新朋友！
en: Well, I like big parties where you can dance, have fun and meet new people!

zh: 你们能就英国派对上该怎么做给我们一些建议吗？
en: And could you give us some advice about what to do at parties in the UK?

zh: 我的建议是穿着得体。
en: My advice is to dress appropriately.

zh: 有些派对是为了特定的正式目的而举办的，比如毕业派对或婚礼。
en: Some parties are held for a specific formal purpose, like a graduation party or a wedding.

zh: 有些可能是不正式的，比如小型晚餐或生日派对。
en: Some may be informal, like a small dinner or birthday party.

zh: 所以如果是正式场合，你应该穿着讲究。
en: So if it's a formal occasion, you should dress smartly.

zh: 例如，穿一套整洁的黑色西装并打领带。
en: Wear a neat black suit and a tie, for example.

zh: 是的，但如果只是一个非正式的派对，你可以穿任何你想穿的，比如T恤和牛仔裤。
en: Yes, but if it's just an informal party, you can wear anything you want, like T-shirts and jeans.

zh: 那么参加派对有什么通用的规则吗？
en: And are there any rules for attending parties in general?

zh: 你知道，像我们这样的成年人有时可能会带一瓶葡萄酒或一些啤酒。
en: You know, adults like us might sometimes bring a bottle of wine or some beer.

zh: 像你们这样的青少年呢？
en: What about teenagers like you?

zh: 我们通常会带一些像零食或布丁之类的东西。
en: We'd usually bring something like snacks or puddings.

zh: 并且尽量别迟到！
en: And try not to be late!

zh: 你应该总是准时。
en: You should always be on time.

zh: 还有，当你到达时，礼貌的做法是打招呼并感谢主人的邀请。
en: Also, when you arrive, it's polite to say hello and thank the host for inviting you.

zh: 如果你和他们不熟，你应该自我介绍并闲聊几句。
en: If you don't know them well, you should introduce yourself and make small talk.

zh: 离开时要说再见并再次感谢他们。
en: And say goodbye and thank them again when you leave.

zh: 如果是毕业派对或婚礼，别忘了送上你的祝贺和美好祝愿。
en: And if it's a graduation party or a wedding, don't forget to offer your congratulations and good wishes.

zh: 努力与他人交谈也很重要。
en: It's also important to make an effort to talk to other people.

zh: 听起来是一些很棒的建议。
en: Sounds like some great advice there.

zh: 这派对太酷了！
en: This is such a cool party!

zh: 祝贺你进入了你梦想的大学！
en: And congratulations on getting into the university of your dreams!

zh: 哦，你以前见过金俊吗？
en: Oh, have you met Jin Jun before?

zh: 我们将上同一所大学！
en: We're going to be at the same university!

zh: 不，我想没有。
en: No, I don't think so.

zh: 但那是个好消息！
en: But that is great news!

zh: 我真为你们俩感到高兴！
en: I'm so happy for you both!

zh: 那么，李红，你是怎么认识王林的？
en: So, Li Hong, how did you know Wang Lin?

zh: 随着我们学年的结束，我想代表三年级的所有学生说几句话。
en: As we come to the end of our school year, I would like to represent all the students of Grade Three and say a few words.

zh: 我想向我们所有的老师、家长和家人们表达我的感谢，这些年来你们为我们付出了这么多。
en: I would like to extend my thanks to all our teachers, parents and families, who have done so much for us over the years.

zh: 我们非常幸运能有你们的爱和支持。
en: We are so fortunate to have your love and support.

zh: 最后，对我所有的同学们说：祝贺初中毕业！
en: Finally, to all my classmates: Congratulations on graduating from junior secondary school!

zh: 你好，王辉！做得好！那是一个很棒的演讲。
en: Hello, Wang Hui! Well done! That was a great speech.

zh: 你们以前见过，但我可以再向您介绍一下我的父母吗？
en: You've met before, but may I introduce you to my parents again?

zh: 王先生，王太太！很高兴再次见到你们。
en: Mr and Mrs Wang! It's a pleasure to see you again.

zh: 也很高兴见到您，陈老师。
en: Lovely to see you too, Ms Chen.

zh: 我们只是想感谢您这些年的辛勤工作。
en: We just wanted to thank you for your hard work over the years.

zh: 王辉是一个很棒的学生。
en: Wang Hui is a great student.

zh: 嗯，我们不想占用您太多时间。
en: Well, we don't want to take up too much of your time.

zh: 享受您今天的剩余时光。
en: Enjoy the rest of your day.
